title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths · Adversarial-Input Lab
summary: Validate a deployment dependency plan and explain unreachable service routes. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a dependency analyzer with path evidence with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Find connected components and explain what connectivity means for the modeled domain.
Detect undirected and directed cycles with the correct parent or active-path state.
Produce and validate a topological order or return concrete cycle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
